title: binaria rutilans
side_effects: Binaria rutilans can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives and anaphylaxis in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to liver damage and kidney failure, requiring immediate medical attention. Additionally, improper dosage can cause dizziness, nausea, and vomiting, as well as interact with other medications, potentially exacerbating existing health conditions. In severe cases, prolonged misuse of binaria rutilans can result in respiratory failure and even death.
